As promised, here’s LOLBIT!

Please leave feedback or requests below!

A fair warning, since we know close to nothing about LOLBIT’s origins, I’m gonna be writing a lot of my own lore (which I do anyway so win win)

I’ll most likely be doing either Fredbear, Withered Bonnie, or Shadow Bonnie for my next bot.

This bot took a long time and it has a decent amount of tokens, as I listed every character and room in sister location (excluding bonnet and ennard.) as always, may be inaccurate.
